title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
